description: WarpBuilder MIR ValueNumberer/MCompare::tryFold did not check that the MCompare actually had Compare_String type before folding away a `typeof x == "undefined"` style compare, hitting the assertion `ins->compareType() == MCompare::Compare_String` at MIR.cpp:3847. sec-high JIT compiler assert. Fix: properly test the compare type before folding (git 5ffc1340655f, andre.bargull, 2021-10-22).
